description_long: This information point consists of several large, freestanding display panels arranged on a flat, open platform. The panels feature a mix of colorful graphics, photographs, and text, likely providing maps, local attractions, and cultural or historical information. The structure is open and accessible from multiple sides, with the panels oriented to maximize visibility for passersby. The main materials appear to be printed laminated boards or metal frames with high-quality printed surfaces, supported by a sturdy base. The design is modern and functional, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation, suitable for placement in public urban spaces such as plazas, parks, or transit hubs. The overall appearance is inviting and informative, encouraging visitors to stop and engage with the content.
description: A modern, multi-panel information point with large, colorful display boards on a flat platform, designed for public urban spaces. The panels feature graphics and text for wayfinding and local information.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main display panels with visible graphics and text, showing the open layout and inviting approach from the front.
description_view_1: From this angle, the rear and side of the panels are visible, revealing the structural supports and the less decorated backs of the boards.
description_view_2: This perspective shows the side arrangement of the panels, emphasizing the layered layout and the depth of the information point.
description_view_3: This view provides a diagonal look at the information point, showcasing the colorful graphics and the open, accessible design from another approach.
attribute_facade_detailing: The facade features large, uninterrupted panels with high-resolution printed graphics and text, bordered by slim metal or plastic frames. The surfaces are smooth and matte, with minimal decorative elements, focusing on clarity and accessibility of information.
